title: AuditLogEventContext
description: The context from which this event originated.

context_type.description:
The type of context.
Can be one of `web`, `desktop`, `mobile`, `asana_support`, `asana`, `email`, or `api`.

api_authentication_method.description:
The authentication method used in the context of an API request.
Only present if the `context_type` is `api`. Can be one of `cookie`, `oauth`, `personal_access_token`, or `service_account`.

client_ip_address.description: The IP address of the client that initiated the event, if applicable.

user_agent.description: The user agent of the client that initiated the event, if applicable.
user_agent.example: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/51.0.2704.103 Safari/537.36

oauth_app_name.description:
The name of the OAuth App that initiated the event.
Only present if the `api_authentication_method` is `oauth`.

rule_name.description: The name of the automation rule that initiated the event.
rule_name.example: When Task is added to this project
